name: Carey, Mariah
source_notes:
An anonymous source quotes an article in Rolling Stone magazine, 23 February 2006, for time of birth and date [http://www.mariahjournal.com/infozone/magazines/2006/rollingstone/index.shtml]: "When Patricia Carey gave birth to a seven-pound baby girl at 7:27 A.M. on March 27th, 1970, the nurse turned to her and said, "That's gonna be one lucky baby." 

However, Frank Clifford pointed out that, as referenced on Wikipedia in February 2021, Carey's birth notice was published in 1969. ("Recent Births Are Announced", ''The Long-Islander'', Huntington, New York, 10 April 1969, section 2, page 3: "Recent births at Huntington Hospital have been announced as follows ... March 27 Mariah, Mr. and Mrs. Alfred Carey, Huntington"). No time given [https://nyshistoricnewspapers.org/lccn/sn83031119/1969-04-10/ed-1/seq-15/#].

Yahoo wrote in article on her age in March 2017, with sources supporting both birth years. [https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/what-is-mariah-careys-real-age-we-investigate-on-her-48th-or-47th-birthday-122330596.html] Carey graduated high school in 1987 and "at the end of the 1987 school year, she’d have just turned 17 if she was born in 1970, and she has never said she skipped a grade. In fact, in her 1999 Homecoming special, during which she returned to her alma mater for a concert, made it clear she wasn’t a great student — and her teachers and superintendent verified that. It seems unlikely she would have graduated a year early", this supports a 1969 birth year. Brett Ratner, her friend and video director, has said that they are “born a day apart”, his birthday being March 28, 1969. Her mother said Mariah was born in 1970 in a 1999 Oprah interview. Carey herself has said, “I don’t have a birthday, I was just dropped here. It was a fairyland experience.” She has described herself as “eternally 12 years old,” and she plans to remain “oblivious to age". Yahoo's "own search to verify her actual birth" with official documents was "frustratingly fruitless".

NNDB.com states "According to People magazine, Carey was born in 1969. In response to fan inquiries about the correct date, a spokesperson of the magazine issued a statement, "We have a copy of Ms. Carey's driver's license, which lists her birthday as March 27, 1969. Furthermore, we spoke with the administrators at the high school she attended who confirmed that Ms. Carey's birthday is March 27, 1969, as did her management when we made our initial interview'".

Starkman rectified to 27 March 1970 07.16.20 EST Asc 11Tau11'.

On the birth certificates of her twins, Monroe and Moroccan, Carey's date of birth is given as "03/27/1970." [http://images4.fanpop.com/image/photos/22200000/Mariah-s-Twins-Birth-Certificates-mariah-careys-lambs-22216353-605-792.jpg].
